items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Edge Closer to Wider War After U.S. Soldiers Killed
items.summary: The United States was said to be sending more warplanes to the Middle East, a move that was already in the works before Iranian fire killed two soldiers in Jordan.

items.title: Thames Water lenders preparing legal challenge in event of Burnham nationalisation
